import type { RouteById } from './routeInfo' import type { AnyRouter } from './router' import type { Expand } from './utils' export type ResolveUseLoaderDeps<TRouter extends AnyRouter, TFrom> = Expand< RouteById<TRouter['routeTree'], TFrom>['types']['loaderDeps'] > export type UseLoaderDepsResult< TRouter extends AnyRouter, TFrom, TSelected, > = unknown extends TSelected ? ResolveUseLoaderDeps<TRouter, TFrom> : TSelected
